headline: This Week In AI Chips - WeRide Advances Multi-Chip Integration With Major Partnerships
summary: WeRide Inc. has announced the multi-chip compatibility of its WeRide Driving (WRD 3.0) ADAS solution, achieving integration across leading computing platforms like NVIDIA, Qualcomm, and SiEngine. This development enables original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) to deploy an extended range of L2++ ADAS solutions, from high-performance to cost-efficient models, signaling a significant shift toward the democratization of these advanced driving technologies. At Auto China 2026, WeRide solidified...

headline: 3 Reasons Why Sandisk Is Up 61% in April
summary: Shares of SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) are climbing again Monday morning, with SNDK stock up roughly 5% in early trading to about $1,046. This extends one of the most remarkable rallies in semiconductor history, with SNDK shares rising 61% in April so far. The stock has continued its sharp climb this month.
